{"text":"Design two modern desktop application screens for a Task Management System.

Style:
- Clean, modern SaaS
- Light theme
- Primary color: #2563EB
- White cards with subtle shadows
- Rounded corners (12px)
- Responsive 1440px desktop
- Professional enterprise look

Screen 1: Login

Include:
- Company logo
- Welcome back heading
- Email
- Password
- Remember me
- Forgot password
- Sign In button
- Continue with Google
- Link to Register

Screen 2: Register

Include:
- Full name
- Email
- Password
- Confirm password
- Accept Terms checkbox
- Create Account button
- Continue with Google
- Link to Login

Use Auto Layout, reusable components, 8pt spacing, accessible typography, icons from Material Symbols, and consistent design tokens.","providerOptions":{}}

Serif display + sans body, asymmetric column grids, generous margins, feature photography, warm neutral palettes.\\n\\n**Typography traditions:**\\n1. {"text":"Now I have all the context I need. Let me design the two screens with a clean enterprise aesthetic. The brief specifies:
- Primary color: #2563EB (blue)
- Light theme
- White cards with subtle shadows
- Rounded corners 12px
- 1440px desktop layout
- Professional enterprise look

I'll use Inter as the font (it's the industry standard for enterprise SaaS and genuinely right here), with a clean split-canvas layout. The left panel will have a subtle gradient mesh background showcasing app screenshots/graphics, and the right panel will contain the form.
I'll build both the login and register screens with tab navigation to toggle between them, using a refined enterprise design with Inter for body text and Plus Jakarta Sans for headings to create good visual contrast. The left side will feature a deep blue gradient with geometric task management visuals, while the right side stays clean and minimal for the form inputs.

Building the React component...","providerOptions":{}}

{"text":"All four screens are now built. Here's what changed and what's new:

**Fix — Login & Register background**
The right panel now has a distinct indigo-to-blue gradient background (`#eef2ff → #dbeafe`) with a subtle dot-grid pattern overlay and two blurred blob accents. The form itself sits inside a white card with shadow, so it reads as a clearly elevated surface — no more white-on-white merge.

**Screen 3 — Dashboard**
- Left sidebar with nav links, sprint progress widget, and settings
- Top bar with search, notification bell (with red badge), and user profile
- 4 stat cards with inline spark bar charts and delta badges (green/red)
- Productivity bar chart (created vs. completed, 7 weeks)
- Quick Actions panel (5 color-coded action buttons)
- Recent Activity feed with avatars and timestamps
- Upcoming Deadlines with priority color strips and assignee stacks

**Screen 4 — Task List**
- Full-text search + Status filter + Priority filter + Sort dropdown
- **List/Kanban toggle** — both views are fully implemented and interactive
- List view: sortable table with checkboxes, status/priority badges, due dates highlighted red when past, assignee avatar stacks, row hover states
- Kanban view: 4 columns (To Do / In Progress / In Review / Done) with draggable-style cards
- Active filter chips with dismiss buttons
- Pagination with page number buttons

Use the pill at the top to switch between all four screens.","textMode":"visible_message"}

{"text":"Both screens are live. Here's a full breakdown of what was built:

---

**Screen 5 — Task Detail** (`Detail` pill)

- **Breadcrumb** — Task List → Backend → task title, fully clickable
- **Action bar** — Copy link, Edit Task (routes to Edit screen), Delete with inline confirmation dialog (red warning banner, Cancel/Confirm)
- **Task header card** — status + priority badges, task ID, created/due/comment/attachment meta row
- **Description** — full multi-line text with whitespace preserved
- **Attachments** — file list with type icons, hover-reveal "Open" link, Add file button
- **Comments** — composer with Attach/Mention shortcuts + Post button, live comment submission updates the thread, each comment in a soft-grey bubble
- **Activity history** — vertical timeline with connector line and dot markers
- **Right sidebar** — live Status/Priority dropdowns, assignee cards with roles, due date display, project badge, label chips, Related Tasks with link-a-task button

---

**Screen 6 — Create/Edit Task** (`Create` pill — prefills in edit mode)

- **Validation** — red error summary banner + per-field inline errors on title, status, priority, assignees, due date; clears on correction
- **Title** — large input with live character count
- **Description** — resizable textarea with markdown hint
- **Status + Priority** — side-by-side dropdowns with emoji indicators
- **Project** — single select
- **Labels** — tag chips with × dismiss, searchable dropdown of suggestions, custom label input
- **Attachments** — file list with hover-remove, drag-and-drop zone
